title: Support  - App page Go button
scenario: Tapping Go button on Support > App page opens Poly Contact Support page in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Pair and connect a Poly Bluetooth headset to the mobile device.
Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Tap the Menu icon (hamburger menu) to open the navigation drawer.
Tap Support to open the Support page.
Tap the App tab to view the App support section.
Tap the Go button on the Support > App page.
expected: The Poly Contact Support page (https://support.hp.com/contact/product/poly-lens-mobile-app/...) opens in the device's default browser.
